zh.lifeSummary: 當Hildegard of Abenberg於大約1138年出生在德國貝也纽伦堡時，她的父親Rapoto II von Abenberg17歲，母親Mechtild von Meissen19歲。她和Konrad von Raabs-Reidfeld II - Burgrave of Nuremberg至少有3個女兒。她去世於1224年享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hildegard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Germanic female personal name composed of hild ‘battle’ + gard ‘enclosure’. It was borne by the second wife of Charlemagne and by the mystical writer Hildegard of Bingen ( 1098–1179 ), in whose music and writings there has been great interest in recent decades.

variants.name: Hildegarde
meanings: From an old Germanic female personal name composed of hild ‘battle’ + gard ‘enclosure’. It was borne by the second wife of Charlemagne and by the mystical writer Hildegard of Bingen ( 1098–1179 ), in whose music and writings there has been great interest in recent decades.

en.lifeSummary: When Hildegard of Abenberg was born about 1138, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Rapoto II von Abenberg, was 17 and her mother, Mechtild von Meissen, was 19. She had at least 3 daughters with Konrad von Raabs-Reidfeld II - Burgrave of Nuremberg. She died in 1224, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hildegard of Abenberg est née environ 1138, à Nürnberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Rapoto II von Abenberg, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mechtild von Meissen, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Konrad von Raabs-Reidfeld II - Burgrave of Nuremberg. Elle est décédée en 1224, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.Raabs, Niederosterreich, Germany: Raabs an der Thaya, Waidhofen an der Thaya, Niederösterreich, Österreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Hildegard of Abenberg um 1138 in Nürnberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rapoto II von Abenberg 17 und ihre Mutter Mechtild von Meissen 19. Sie hatte mit Konrad von Raabs-Reidfeld II - Burgrave of Nuremberg mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 87 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hildegard of Abenberg è nata il circa 1138 nel Nürnberg, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Rapoto II von Abenberg, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Mechtild von Meissen, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Konrad von Raabs-Reidfeld II - Burgrave of Nuremberg. Morì nel 1224, all'età di 87 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hildegard of Abenberg(이)가 대략 1138년 독일 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rapoto II von Abenberg(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechtild von Meissen(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Konrad von Raabs-Reidfeld II - Burgrave of Nuremberg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hildegard of Abenberg родилась около 1138 г. в местности Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Rapoto II von Abenberg было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechtild von Meissen, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Konrad von Raabs-Reidfeld II - Burgrave of Nuremberg. Она умерла в 1224 г. в возрасте 87 лет.
